$comment: │  CSV → Bronze    │ │  CSV → Bronze   │ │  CSV → Bronze   │
Phase 1: 3 Dataflows run in parallel - load CSVs from BronzeLH/Files/ into BronzeLH tables.
Phase 2: NB01 reads Bronze tables, applies transforms, writes to SilverLH.
Phase 3: NB02 enriches Silver with external API data.
Phase 4: NB03 builds Gold star schema from Silver.
Phase 5: NB04 runs forecasting models on Gold data.
IMPORTANT: After first deployment, open each Dataflow in the Fabric portal
to configure the Lakehouse connection and output destinations.
Token placeholders ({{...}}) resolved at deploy time by Deploy-Pipeline.ps1.

properties.description: Medallion ETL: DF(CSV→Bronze) → NB01(Bronze→Silver) → NB02(WebEnrich) → NB03(Silver→Gold) → NB04(Forecasting)

activities.$comment: ── Phase 1a: Dataflow Finance - CSV to Bronze tables ──
activities.name: HorizonBooks_DF_Finance
activities.description: Dataflow Gen2: Loads DimAccounts, DimCostCenters, FactFinancialTransactions, FactBudget CSVs into BronzeLH tables.

activities.$comment: ── Phase 1b: Dataflow HR - CSV to Bronze tables ──
activities.name: HorizonBooks_DF_HR
activities.description: Dataflow Gen2: Loads DimEmployees, DimDepartments, FactPayroll, FactPerformanceReviews, FactRecruitment CSVs into BronzeLH tables.

activities.$comment: ── Phase 1c: Dataflow Operations - CSV to Bronze tables ──
activities.name: HorizonBooks_DF_Operations
activities.description: Dataflow Gen2: Loads DimBooks, DimAuthors, DimCustomers, DimGeography, DimWarehouses, FactOrders, FactInventory, FactReturns CSVs into BronzeLH tables.

activities.$comment: ── Phase 2: Bronze to Silver (reads from Bronze tables) ──
activities.name: HorizonBooks_01_BronzeToSilver
activities.description: PySpark: BronzeLH tables → SilverLH Delta (finance/hr/operations schemas). Quality checks, transforms, dedup.

activities.name: HorizonBooks_02_WebEnrichment
activities.description: PySpark: fetches external API data → SilverLH.web schema. Runs after NB01 to ensure Silver schemas exist.

activities.name: HorizonBooks_03_SilverToGold
activities.description: PySpark: SilverLH (finance+hr+operations+web) → GoldLH star schema (dim/fact schemas) + analytics views.

activities.name: HorizonBooks_04_Forecasting
activities.description: PySpark: Builds Holt-Winters forecasts on Gold data — sales revenue, genre demand, financial P&L, inventory, workforce.
